name: @aztec-fpc/contract-deployment
description: Bundleable FPC contract deployment CLI for devnet

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/configure-token.ts --outdir=dist --target=${BUILD_TARGET:-bun} --external @aztec/bb.js --external @aztec/noir-noirc_abi --external @aztec/noir-acvm_js --external pino --external lmdb --external ordered-binary
